summary: Completed backend testing for Midwife contract defaults and contract/invoice creation. Fixed 3 critical bugs in backend. All 14 tests PASSED.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Was looking for 'provider_id' field in clients, but midwife clients use 'pro_user_id'
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed query from provider_id/provider_type to pro_user_id/pro_type

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Same issue - looking for 'provider_id' instead of 'pro_user_id'
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed query to use correct field names

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Invoice send endpoint was using 'provider_type' instead of 'pro_type' when looking up client
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed query from provider_type=MIDWIFE to pro_type=MIDWIFE

frontend_issues.notes: Backend-only testing was requested. Frontend code review confirms contracts.tsx and invoices.tsx correctly pass data to apiRequest without double JSON.stringify.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/midwife/contract-defaults returns empty {} or saved defaults
VERIFIED: PUT /api/midwife/contract-defaults saves all 16 midwife contract text fields
VERIFIED: POST /api/midwife/contracts creates contract without 422 error
VERIFIED: POST /api/midwife/invoices creates invoice without 422 error
FIXED: Changed provider_id to pro_user_id in contract creation endpoint
FIXED: Changed provider_id to pro_user_id in invoice creation endpoint
FIXED: Changed provider_type to pro_type in invoice send endpoint
Frontend contracts.tsx passes payload directly to apiRequest without JSON.stringify (line 329-332)
Frontend invoices.tsx passes invoiceData directly to apiRequest (line 138-148)
seed_data_creation: Created test clients during tests, cleaned up test contracts and invoices after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Midwife contract-defaults GET/PUT endpoints tested and working. Contract and invoice creation APIs fixed - were using wrong field names (provider_id instead of pro_user_id). All 14 backend tests passing.

TestMidwifeContractDefaults.test_get_contract_defaults_empty_or_data: PASSED - Returns 200 with empty or saved data

TestMidwifeContractCreation.test_create_contract_with_valid_data: PASSED - No 422 error, contract created with all fields

bug_fixes_applied.server.py_line_4013-4019: Changed client lookup from provider_id/provider_type to pro_user_id/pro_type for contract creation
bug_fixes_applied.server.py_line_5029-5032: Changed client lookup from provider_id/provider_type to pro_user_id/pro_type for invoice creation
bug_fixes_applied.server.py_line_5140-5141: Changed client lookup from provider_type to pro_type for invoice send notification
